title: dracocephalum stewartianum
intro: Dracocephalum stewartianum, also known as Stewart's dragonhead, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Dracocephalum stewartianum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
